title: oberonia intermedia
intro: Oberonia intermedia is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia intermedia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even treat certain types of infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a tincture or made into a paste for topical application.
